archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / Warm Hospitality) with vibrant brand accents

buttons.primary: bg-brand text-white rounded-pill px-lg py-md min-h-[44px] justify-center items-center flex-row
buttons.secondary: bg-brand_light text-brand rounded-pill px-lg py-md min-h-[44px] justify-center items-center flex-row
buttons.outline: border border-border_subtle bg-white text-text_primary rounded-pill px-lg py-md min-h-[44px]
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-text_muted rounded-pill px-lg py-md min-h-[44px]

badges.status_pending: bg-bg_surface text-text_muted rounded-pill px-sm py-xs text-xs font-mono
badges.status_preparing: bg-brand_light text-brand rounded-pill px-sm py-xs text-xs font-mono
badges.status_ready: bg-[#FFF8ED] text-amber rounded-pill px-sm py-xs text-xs font-mono
badges.status_en_route: bg-[#E8F5F1] text-success rounded-pill px-sm py-xs text-xs font-mono
badges.status_delivered: bg-bg_surface text-text_muted rounded-pill px-sm py-xs text-xs font-mono line-through

skeletons.animation: Use react-native-reanimated for a continuous shimmer translation effect across the view.

onboarding.layout: Full-screen vertical centered flex with safe area insets.
components: Brand Hero: 'Yeamigo' text-4xl font-bold text-brand, tagline 'Good food, great amigos.' text-base text-text_muted.
Role Selector: 4 large elevated cards (Customer, Restaurant, Rider, Admin). Each containing a Lucide icon and role title.
Auth Form: TextInput with border-subtle and rounded-md. Primary button for Login/Signup.
Icon: Oversized lucide icon (e.g., ShoppingBag for cart) colored text-hint.
Title: text-xl text-text_primary font-bold text-center mt-lg.
Subtitle: text-base text-text_muted text-center mt-sm.
Action: Optional Outline/Primary button to redirect the user.

customer.navigation: Bottom Tab Nav (Home, Orders, Support, Profile). Hidden on deep screens (e.g., Cart, Tracking).

components: Header: Sticky, bg-white with Safe Area Top.
Hero Search Bar: pill-shaped, bg-bg_surface, min-h-[44px], lucide search icon.
Category Pills: Horizontal FlatList of filter chips (e.g., Burgers, Pizza, Vegan).
Restaurant Grid: flex-row flex-wrap justify-between. Cards take 48% width.

Restaurant Card: Cover image (aspect 4:3), rounded-lg. Absolute positioned logo overlay (rounded-pill, border-2 border-white) bottom-left of image. Details below: Title (bold text-base), Rating (star icon + text), ETA / Delivery Fee.
Parallax Banner: Image stretching on pull-down.
Sticky Category Tabs: Horizontal scroll pinning to top beneath header.
Item Card: flex-row, text details on left (title, desc, price), thumbnail image on right (rounded-md, size 80x80).
Hero Photo: full width, aspect 16:9.
Variants: Radio button rows for sizing/options.
Quantity Stepper: -, 1, + buttons in a bg-bg_surface pill.
Add to Order: Massive primary CTA button pinned to safe-area bottom.

cart.layout: Vertical ScrollView with fixed bottom panel.
components: Order List: Items with inline quantity adjusters.
Receipt Summary: Subtotal, Fees, Total with dashed border-t border-border_subtle separating lines.
Checkout Button: Sticky to bottom safe area.

live_tracking.layout: Split view: Map on top (absolute fill or aspect 1:1), Tracker UI Sheet below.
components: Map Section: Image placeholder with rider/destination pins.
Progress Tracker: Vertical step indicator (dots connected by lines). Active step in brand color.
Dynamic Message: 'Rider is 3 mins away' in bold text-2xl Sora.
Action Buttons: Ghost button for 'Call Rider', Outline for 'Support'.

restaurant_owner.navigation: Drawer/Sidebar. Main content area takes remaining space.

dashboard.layout: Grid of metrics and vertical list for live feed.
components: Live Order Cards: Elevated cards for recent incoming orders.
Pulse Animation: 'New Order' badge with continuous scaling and fading opacity animation using react-native-reanimated.
Swimlanes: Pending, Preparing, Ready, En Route, Delivered. bg-bg_surface rounded-lg w-[300px] p-md mx-sm.
Kanban Card: Elevated card. Shows Order ID (JetBrains Mono text-sm), Items summary, elapsed Time badge.

menu_builder.layout: Vertical list view with edit toggles.
components: Category Headers with 'Add Item' outline button.
List Items: Draggable rows with edit/delete icon actions.

home.layout: Map view taking up most of the screen. Bottom panel for status.
components: Online Toggle: Massive pill slider or button. text-success when online, text-text_muted when offline.
Earnings Ring: Circular progress indicator around user avatar showing daily goal completion.

incoming_offer.layout: Bottom Sheet popping up abruptly (high priority modal).
components: Route Summary: Restaurant to Customer address mapping.
Earnings: Prominently displayed text-3xl font-bold text-text_primary.
Countdown Ring: 20-second SVG circular timer around the Accept button. Animates strokeDashoffset.
Reject button: ghost styling.

active_delivery.layout: Full screen map with floating action cards over it.
components: Pickup/Delivery Phases: Card indicating current phase.
Action Swipe: 'Slide to confirm pickup' interactive component.

overview.layout: Responsive grid (flex-row flex-wrap) of summary cards.
components: Metric Cards: Total Revenue, Active Riders, Live Orders. Elevated cards.
Data Tables: Recent support tickets, flagged restaurants.

implementation_instructions_for_main_age.styling: Use standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind. Adhere to design tokens exactly. Avoid standard HTML elements; strictly use React Native primitives (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image, ScrollView, FlatList).
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.data_testids: MANDATORY. Every interactive component (buttons, inputs, toggles, list items) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, e.g., 'customer-login-button'.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.safe_area: Use 'react-native-safe-area-context' to wrap screens and appropriately apply padding to top/bottom navs to prevent notch/home-indicator overlaps.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.icons: Use 'lucide-react-native'. Size: 24 for standard, 20 for inline elements. Color: text_muted by default.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.animations: Use 'react-native-reanimated' for the Restaurant Order pulse animation and the Rider 20-second countdown ring.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.tap_targets: Ensure minimum 44x44 points for all TouchableOpacity elements by padding or specifying minHeight.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.grids: CSS Grid is not natively supported in React Native. Use 'flexDirection: row' with 'flexWrap: wrap' for the 2-column discovery feed (width: '48%', justifyContent: 'space-between').
